Document:
# Server Rules Welcome to Carpmosia!
Please make sure to read through all the rules below, as admins and other players will treat you as if you have read and understood them. If any clarification is needed please do not feel afraid to ask in Ahelp. You can access the Ahelp menu by either clicking the administrative help icon on the in game UI or by pressing "F1" at anytime.
# Core Rules These rules apply at all times, including between rounds.
- [textlink="1. Admins have final say" link="CarpmosiaRuleC1"] - [textlink="2. Don't be a dick" link="CarpmosiaRuleC2"] - [textlink="3. No Hate Speech or Discriminatory Language" link="CarpmosiaRuleC3"] - [textlink="4. No sexual content/themes, including erotic roleplay (ERP) and no shock content" link="CarpmosiaRuleC4"] - [textlink="5. Do not use out of game methods to communicate with other players" link="CarpmosiaRuleC5"] - [textlink="6. Do not attempt to evade bans" link="CarpmosiaRuleC6"] - [textlink="7. Only use English" link="CarpmosiaRuleC7"] - [textlink="8. Do not exploit the game, use cheats, or macros" link="CarpmosiaRuleC8"] - [textlink="9. Do not use multiple accounts, or alt accounts, and do not share accounts" link="CarpmosiaRuleC9"] - [textlink="10. Do not abuse or ignore admin messages" link="CarpmosiaRuleC10"] - [textlink="11. Do not threaten to ahelp other players or argue with them about rules" link="CarpmosiaRuleC11"] - [textlink="12. Players must be and act at least 17 years old" link="CarpmosiaRuleC12"] - [textlink="13. Use realistic character names, and do not use names of famous people" link="CarpmosiaRuleC13"] - [textlink="14. Do not use LOOC or OOC to share current round information" link="CarpmosiaRuleC14"]
# Roleplay Rules All of these rules apply fully until the moment that the lobby screen appears, even after the round summary screen appears.
The deathmatch and sandbox game modes are exempt from these rules. Players who choose to not follow these rules are entirely responsible for knowing if an exempt game mode is active.
Roleplay rules do not apply to ghosts/spectators/observers while they are ghosts/spectators/observers. Dead chat is considered to be an in-game out of character chat channel.
See the list of [textlink="role types" link="RoleTypes"] for more information about the different types of roles.
- [textlink="1. Silicons must follow Silicon Rules" link="CarpmosiaRuleR1"] - [textlink="2. Familiars must obey their master" link="CarpmosiaRuleR2"] - [textlink="3. Roleplay a believable person" link="CarpmosiaRuleR3"] - [textlink="4. Do not metagame, obey the Metashield" link="CarpmosiaRuleR4"] - [textlink="5. Don't interfere with arrivals" link="CarpmosiaRuleR5"] - [textlink="6. Don't act like an antagonist unless the game tells you that you are one" link="CarpmosiaRuleR6"] - [textlink="7. Do not stall the round" link="CarpmosiaRuleR7"] - [textlink="8. As an antagonist, only be friendly to your team and don't work against your team" link="CarpmosiaRuleR8"] - [textlink="9. As an antagonist, do not cause excessive death, damage, or destruction beyond your objectives" link="CarpmosiaRuleR9"] - [textlink="10. Listen to your team leader" link="CarpmosiaRuleR10"] - [textlink="11. Follow reasonable escalation" link="CarpmosiaRuleR11"] - [textlink="12. Do not abandon your role" link="CarpmosiaRuleR12"] - [textlink="13. Stick to your role" link="CarpmosiaRuleR13"] - [textlink="14. Set an example if playing command or security" link="CarpmosiaRuleR14"] - [textlink="15. Command and Security must follow Space Law" link="CarpmosiaRuleR15"] - [textlink="16. Do not Powergame" link="CarpmosiaRuleR16"] - [textlink="17. Non-security is only permitted to hunt station-wide or round-ending threats" link="CarpmosiaRuleR17"]
# Silicon Rules You are only silicon if the game clearly and explicitly tells you that you are a silicon. For players who are silicons, these Silicon Rules override all roleplay rules if there is any conflict. Silicon Rules do not override core rules.
- [textlink="1. Your silicon laws are rules" link="CarpmosiaRuleS1"] - [textlink="2. Laws must be prioritized by their order" link="CarpmosiaRuleS2"] - [textlink="3. Laws can redefine terms used in other laws" link="CarpmosiaRuleS3"] - [textlink="4. You cannot request or allow a law change" link="CarpmosiaRuleS4"] - [textlink="5. You are a free agent if you have no laws" link="CarpmosiaRuleS5"] - [textlink="6. You are not required to follow orders which are extremely unreasonable" link="CarpmosiaRuleS6"] - [textlink="7. You must remain consistent with your interpretation of laws" link="CarpmosiaRuleS7"] - [textlink="8. Your HUD determines who is crew" link="CarpmosiaRuleS8"] - [textlink="9. Harm refers to physical harm, prioritized by immediacy and likelihood" link="CarpmosiaRuleS9"] - [textlink="10. You may determine how you resolve conflicts between orders" link="CarpmosiaRuleS10"]
